competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Attempt blocked. Leandro Trossard (Belgium) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Attempt blocked. Youri Tielemans (Belgium) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Nicolas Raskin.

events.description: 尤里·蒂莱曼斯射门被封堵。 尼古拉斯·拉斯金参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Timothy Castagne (Belgium) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top left corner by Matt Freese (USA).
Corner, Belgium. Conceded by Matt Freese.
Attempt saved. Charles De Ketelaere (Belgium) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Matt Freese (USA). Assisted by Maxim De Cuyper with a cross.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Charles De Ketelaere Shot On Tar

events.description: 查尔斯·德·克特拉雷射正。 马克西姆·德·屈佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Dodi Lukébakio (Belgium) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Youri Tielemans (Belgium) right footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Timothy Castagne.

events.description: 尤里·蒂莱曼斯射门偏出。 蒂莫西·卡斯塔涅参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! USA 0, Belgium 1. Charles De Ketelaere (Belgium) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Nicolas Raskin.

events.description: 查尔斯·德·克特拉雷破门。 比分 0-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Charles De Ketelaere (Belgium) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match because of an injury Chris Richards (USA).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Leandro Trossard (Belgium) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Charles De Ketelaere.

events.description: 特罗萨德射门偏出。 查尔斯·德·克特拉雷参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Belgium. Charles De Ketelaere is caught offside.
Delay in match because of an injury Amadou Onana (Belgium).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Brandon Mechele (Belgium).
Substitution, Belgium. Hans Vanaken replaces Amadou Onana because of an injury.

events.description: 汉斯·范纳肯替补登场，换下阿马杜·奥纳纳。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Dodi Lukébakio (Belgium).
Maxim De Cuyper (Belgium) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Nicolas Raskin (Belgium).
Foul by Brandon Mechele (Belgium).
Goal! USA 1, Belgium 1. Malik Tillman (USA) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the high centre of the goal.

events.description: 马利克·蒂尔曼破门。 比分 1-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! USA 1, Belgium 2. Charles De Ketelaere (Belgium) header from very close range to the top right corner. Assisted by Leandro Trossard with a cross.

events.description: 查尔斯·德·克特拉雷破门。 比分 1-2。

qualifiers.espnText: Nicolas Raskin (Belgium) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Weston McKennie (USA) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 韦斯顿·麦肯尼吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Belgium. Conceded by Tyler Adams.
Attempt saved. Nicolas Raskin (Belgium) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the centre of the goal by Matt Freese (USA). Assisted by Youri Tielemans with a cross.

events.description: 尼古拉斯·拉斯金射正。 尤里·蒂莱曼斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Hans Vanaken (Belgium) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt missed. Dodi Lukébakio (Belgium) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Maxim De Cuyper with a cross following a set piece situation.

events.description: 多迪·卢克巴基奥射门偏出。 马克西姆·德·屈佩参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Alex Freeman (USA) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Malik Tillman.

events.description: 亚历克斯·弗里曼射门偏出。 马利克·蒂尔曼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Folarin Balogun (USA) right footed shot from very close range is too high. Assisted by Alex Freeman.

events.description: 巴洛贡射门偏出。 亚历克斯·弗里曼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, USA. Giovanni Reyna replaces Sergiño Dest.

events.description: 乔瓦尼·雷纳替补登场，换下塞尔吉诺·德斯特。

qualifiers.espnText: VAR Decision: Other Decision Cancelled.
Foul by Youri Tielemans (Belgium).
Corner, Belgium. Conceded by Alex Freeman.
Attempt missed. Dodi Lukébakio (Belgium) left footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Nathan Ngoy following a corner.

events.description: 多迪·卢克巴基奥射门偏出。 内森·恩戈伊参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Nicolas Raskin (Belgium).
Corner, Belgium. Conceded by Tim Ream.
Corner, USA. Conceded by Nathan Ngoy.
Delay in match because of an injury Christian Pulisic (USA).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! USA 1, Belgium 3. Hans Vanaken (Belgium) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Charles De Ketelaere.

events.description: 汉斯·范纳肯破门。 比分 1-3。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, USA. Sebastian Berhalter replaces Christian Pulisic because of an injury.

events.description: 塞巴斯蒂安·伯哈尔特替补登场，换下普利西奇。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Leandro Trossard (Belgium) left footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Charles De Ketelaere.

events.description: 特罗萨德射门被封堵。 查尔斯·德·克特拉雷参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Belgium. Conceded by Chris Richards.
Corner, USA. Conceded by Youri Tielemans.
Attempt missed. Alex Freeman (USA) header from the centre of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Sebastian Berhalter with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 亚历克斯·弗里曼射门偏出。 塞巴斯蒂安·伯哈尔特参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Nathan Ngoy (Belgium).
Malik Tillman (USA) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, Belgium. Jérémy Doku replaces Dodi Lukébakio.

events.description: 杰里米·多库替补登场，换下多迪·卢克巴基奥。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Belgium. Romelu Lukaku replaces Charles De Ketelaere.

events.description: 卢卡库替补登场，换下查尔斯·德·克特拉雷。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Malik Tillman (USA).
Malik Tillman (USA) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 马利克·蒂尔曼吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, USA. Ricardo Pepi replaces Tyler Adams.

events.description: 里卡多·佩皮替补登场，换下泰勒·亚当斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Malik Tillman (USA).
Foul by Antonee Robinson (USA).
Malik Tillman (USA) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt missed. Sebastian Berhalter (USA) left footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left.

events.description: 塞巴斯蒂安·伯哈尔特射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Weston McKennie (USA).
Attempt saved. Folarin Balogun (USA) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Thibaut Courtois (Belgium). Assisted by Giovanni Reyna.

events.description: 巴洛贡射正。 乔瓦尼·雷纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, USA. Conceded by Brandon Mechele.
Attempt missed. Folarin Balogun (USA) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Sebastian Berhalter with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 巴洛贡射门偏出。 塞巴斯蒂安·伯哈尔特参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Sebastian Berhalter (USA) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt blocked. Leandro Trossard (Belgium) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Jérémy Doku.

events.description: 特罗萨德射门被封堵。 杰里米·多库参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Ricardo Pepi (USA) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Sebastian Berhalter (USA).

events.description: 塞巴斯蒂安·伯哈尔特犯规。

player.name: 亚历克西斯·萨勒马克尔斯

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Belgium. Alexis Saelemaekers replaces Leandro Trossard.

events.description: 亚历克西斯·萨勒马克尔斯替补登场，换下特罗萨德。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Belgium. Axel Witsel replaces Nicolas Raskin.

events.description: 阿克塞尔·维特塞尔替补登场，换下尼古拉斯·拉斯金。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Sebastian Berhalter (USA).

events.description: 塞巴斯蒂安·伯哈尔特犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, USA. Max Arfsten replaces Antonee Robinson.

events.description: 马克斯·阿夫斯坦替补登场，换下安东尼·罗宾逊。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, USA. Haji Wright replaces Folarin Balogun.

events.description: 哈基·莱特替补登场，换下巴洛贡。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! USA 1, Belgium 4. Romelu Lukaku (Belgium) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Hans Vanaken.
Second Half ends, USA 1, Belgium 4.

source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。
